title: taraxacum ploegii
intro: Taraxacum ploegii, also known as the Mongolian dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family Asteraceae, native to China and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential to reduce inflammation and improve liver function. The health benefits of Taraxacum ploegii include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Taraxacum ploegii is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses.
